_comment: Each platform: a direct {url}, OR {github,tag,match} that resolves the CURRENT release asset by name (handles mpv's rolling nightly 'git-release' builds). Run `bun run fetch-mpv` (or `--dry` to just print URLs). See README.md. Note: macos-x64 needs macOS 15+, macos-arm64 needs macOS 14+. Linux isn't on mpv git-release — supply a static build / AppImage URL yourself.
